overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 following characters through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The clip begins in a graffiti-covered pedestrian corridor, ascends multiple stairways through an elevated walkway, and emerges onto a bustling downtown street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements.

events.description: character begins ascending the concrete stairway
reaching the top of the first flight of stairs into an upper level

agents.ego_description: following a pink-haired character in a gold jacket and purple skirt through a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: pink-haired woman in gold jacket walking up the stairway

entered.detail: brown metal wall covered in colorful spray paint graffiti and tags
rectangular fluorescent light fixture illuminating the corridor
wide concrete staircase with red painted railings on the sides

segments.scene_description: The segment follows a pink-haired character through a narrow, enclosed pedestrian corridor with heavily graffiti-tagged walls. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow as they approach and ascend a wide concrete stairway illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights, with other pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with neon benches and tree

events.description: passing futuristic blue neon-lit benches and a large potted tree
beginning ascent of the second stairway

agents.ego_description: following a male character with a shaved head, tan vest, and white pants through an elevated walkway area

notable_agents.action: man with vest and white pants walking up the stairs

entered.detail: futuristic seating with glowing blue neon trim along the edges
mature tree growing from a circular concrete planter
concrete stairs leading upward to the next level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an elevated, semi-covered walkway featuring futuristic blue neon benches and a large potted tree. The camera follows a male character as he moves through this intermediate level and begins ascending a second concrete stairway, with graffiti-covered walls visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell with Asian-inspired gate and red lanterns

events.description: passing through the Asian-style gate with hanging red lanterns
exiting the stairwell to the neon-lit street level

agents.ego_description: following the male character up the final enclosed stairway through a traditional-style gate with red lanterns

notable_agents.action: man with vest ascending the final flight toward the street exit

entered.detail: traditional curved roof gate with red columns and decorative elements
red paper lanterns hanging in a row under the gate archway
gray concrete walls covered in black and blue graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The segment moves through a narrow, enclosed stairwell with heavily tagged concrete walls. The camera follows the character as they ascend toward and pass through an Asian-inspired gate adorned with red paper lanterns, representing the final transition from the interior corridors to the street level.

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements
black sedans drive through the intersection

agents.ego_description: exploring the downtown street, panning up to admire the towering neon skyscrapers, then observing passing vehicles at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings covered in bright neon signs and holographic advertisements
yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt
large glowing holographic advertisement displays on building facades
vertical traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a wide, neon-drenched cyberpunk street with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The camera pans up to emphasize the vertical scale of the buildings before settling on street level to observe sparse traffic moving through the intersection, with pedestrians scattered along the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn corridor into the expansive, neon-lit verticality of a cyberpunk downtown. It begins by following a pink-haired character through a narrow pedestrian passage, ascending a wide concrete stairway under the hum of fluorescent lights. As the camera moves upward, the environment opens into a semi-covered elevated walkway featuring blue neon benches and a potted tree before transitioning into a second, more enclosed stairwell with heavily tagged walls. The scene then passes through an Asian-inspired gate adorned with red paper lanterns, serving as a threshold that leads the camera out of the interior corridors. Finally, the view emerges onto a wide street where the camera pans upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements before settling on the sparse traffic and pedestrians of the city intersection.
